FullRegression.Title: Top-left clan and support hover
FullRegression.Setup: Load a fixed save or enter the main loop.

FullRegression.Title: Knowledge screen nodes, upgrade icons, footer and close
FullRegression.Setup: Open the knowledge screen from the main loop.

FullRegression.Title: Clan screen action button hovers
FullRegression.Setup: Load the fixed save and open the clan screen.

FullRegression.Title: Three visible clans and six trait hovers
FullRegression.Setup: Load BVT-LCL from the main menu and open the top-left clan screen.

Evidence.Note: Harness timed out on the first hover stabilization, but the captured tooltip was visually checked and the localized text was correct.

FullRegression.Title: Main-loop visible button hover sweep
FullRegression.Setup: Load a fixed save that exposes visible command and sidebar buttons.

FullRegression.Title: Thirty-seven random tile click and lower-right tooltip checks
FullRegression.Setup: Use the saved random start that exposes the target map/tile set.

FullRegression.Title: Main-menu load-save hovers, then fixed-save main-loop toolbar and tile tooltip
FullRegression.Interface: Load Save / Main Loop HUD / Main Loop Map
FullRegression.Setup: Start from the main menu. Hover the main-menu Load Saved Game button if needed, click it, test the load-save screen hovers there, then load Quicksave.AtGSave and test the main-loop toolbar and target tile from that fixed state. Do not open the load-save screen from the in-game pause/main-loop UI for this scenario.
ExpectedNo: Select and view your Religious beliefs
Click to delete all saved game files
This action can be performed by pressing

Points.Label: Open Load Saved Game from main menu
Load the fixed save from the main-menu load screen
Nested hotkey tooltip inside strategic view tooltip

FullRegression.Title: Reload a fixed save from the in-game pause menu without OOM
FullRegression.Setup: Load the selected fixed save from the main menu, press Escape in the main loop, choose Load Saved Game from the pause menu, and load the promoted first row again. Repeat five times in the same process and wait only for a new World Screen log marker written after each reload began.

Incremental.Title: Clan list header first-level hovers and Level nested tooltip
Incremental.Setup: Load a fixed save or enter the main loop, then click the top-right clan-list button. Test only the first row of header hovers plus the Level nested tooltip.

Incremental.Title: Selected settlement info panel and Pack Up tooltip
Incremental.Setup: Enter a new game or load a fixed save with a visible central settlement. Click the central settlement to show the left selection panel and command list, then hover Pack Up.

Points.Label: Pack Up tooltip with settlement selected

Incremental.Title: Lower-right terrain description should not show English all
Incremental.Setup: Load a fixed save or use the visible start map. Click a tile whose lower-right terrain description previously included the English word all.

Points.Label: Click terrain tile that exposes lower-right description

Incremental.Title: Religion screen title and religion choices
Incremental.Setup: Load the current fixed save directly from the main-menu load flow, then open the main-loop Religion screen. Do not start a new game or load from the in-game pause menu.
